TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == kazizeng, lunuk a kazizeng "kamu nu Ing, car, kamu nu Ameylikaay automobile, kamu nu Ameylika, auto" anca kazizeng, siicelangay amisaungay taayaw, caay kapiduduc tu zazan atu dingsing, asiicelang amuculil ku akazizeng. tuyni a kamu, tusaay a bihel atu kikayay a kazizeng, u kazizeng han, tuyni adidi'ay, tu tuluay anca sepatay a bihel, u akiti' ku nipisaungay nu kasazizeng u kazizeng han, "nikauzip a nisakamuan tu kazizeng hananay". i tawya a zidayay a kamu, u sepatay ku bihel nu kazizeng nu kikayay lunuk a kazizenng, u madayumay a cukaymasan malalamel tu simal atu bali, samalikat icelang, angangan i zazan muculil, u sapitupin tu tademaw anca u sapiculu' tu tuud. satu i sakuwa tu saculilan, uma a kanatal masazuama ku nikawaw. patinaku tu Cong-hwa-min -kow, cayay ku micukaymasay tu patelayanay tu nu dingkiay a kazizeng, atu tusaay a bihel, sanlinsya icelangay a kazizeng u "utubay" han, u mapakuwanay a kazizeng. i Zipun, micukaymas tu labuay nu akuti' a icelang nu sanlisya u nipatahkal tu bali kitabakian tu 125 ml tu tusaay a bihel a kazizeng, mapalecad a makuwan tu sunuk a kazizang "automobile" nika makay nilungad tu likisi atu anuayaway a piazih tu sunuk a kazizeng tabaki aku nizatang, kamu nu Ing, automobile, maydih a izaw ku nipazeng ilabu tu nu dingki aa aicelang atu makai tu likutay a zazan tu tukasay a saculilan, pasu nanialesantu nika matatungus tu sapupu tu hekal maydih a cumelak tu baluhay lalayanay a akuti', ayza malaheciay a ke-bwanay nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng, saca micukaymas siniculil a Tan-ke-ce. i ke-ban a lalangawan nuzuma tatenga' atu zumaay a saculil matatinpaay a kikay pala kazizengen, mahini mubahelay a kazizeng atu muculilay a kazizeng tungusay sabahel atu kikay a tademaw sangaleb tatungus. mucukaymas tu siman amin ku kazizeng, ca-yu lalayan a sayliw mala u pasaicelang a lalekalan, i piculil nu kazizeng patahkal tu al-yang-hwa-tan a la'cusay a bali, amauninng ku bali, u lalekalan sa u akuti' atu cilemin ku kitakit. Ameylika nu midiputay tu hekal pulung a nipiasip tu nipalawpes nu kazizeng tu simal 1-cyailun, asi 8,887 ke ku al-yang-hwa-tan, ca-yu a kazizeng paylapes tu ca-yu 1-cya-lun, asial-yang-hwa-tan tu 10,18 ke. mahiza, pacakat tu simal miselep tu patahkal tu la'cusay a bali, malasasakamuan. katuud ku kanatal mahiza micukaymas tu zazan a sata anca simal a sata "kamu nu Ing, Energy Tax Act" cay-cin a lekakawa maselep ku picakay nu binawlan tu kazizeng. namahini, sakay amihulak tuyni a kawaw, palahad tu dingkiay a kazizeng atu palamel tu kikayay a kazizeng, u sasakamuan pasaza a palahad, mililid tu yadahay a kazizeng tu sanga'ay nu misiwbayay a migingkiw, zayhan taneng nu pauningay a kazizeng, limad han tu padingkiay a kusi "anca misangaay tu cin a kusi"sanad amisulimed, caay ku kaselep tu pilusimet tu nipauning, amacakat kapah ku pilisimet tu uningn, saca taneng macakat ku kalamkam akuti' "adidi' ku simal a tabaki ku icelang, nika padingki a kusi ataneng paliyu tu adidi'ay a sapaakuti' tu labu a kikay". namahini, katuud ku malungaday a kanatal hatu u cen-bu ku micuzuhay tu canacanan a kawlahan, mitanam mihulak tu kayadah ku nipicukaymas tu kazizeng amapauning ku hekal. mahizaay zayliw a sata a taneng talakaw ku kawlah anca cayay kayadah uning a kazizeng "mahiniay dingkiay a kazizeng, lamelaya kazize ng hakay u nipakutayayan tu zayliw tu baluhay lalayanay dingki a kazizen g". nipalalecad, ayzaay a kazizengan iza ku 75% u tanengay panukasen, mkicukaymas panukasan nu mukinnay taneng misele tu nipalawpes tu dingki atu uning. Ameylika a pikaygian migiti tu demiad tu sakay lyen-pang cen-bu a nikaketunan tu kalamkam nu siamal patahkal mataten gil, tataneng nu labang a kazizeng i 1985 a mihcaan a nikatetunan, u kalamkam nu simal 27.5 ing-li nu Ameylikaay a cya-luna "8.6 kung-sen paycacay a lasubu kung-l, 33.0 ing-li paying-ce-cya-lun" ahemaway a tulaku a tataneng I 2007 a mihcaan misumad a misakapah, kayadah nu simal 22.2 ing-li paying-ce-cya-lun "10.6 kung-sen pay 100 kung-li, 26.7 ing-li paying-ce-cya-lun". zayhan takalaw ku nikauning caay katuduh simal nu kazizeng atu cay-yuay a labu nu pasimalan, cunus nuyaanay a sapaakuti zayliway a simalan caay kayadah ku nipisuped tu layanay, caay akadayum miala atu misanan i caay kayadah a kitizaan, katuud tu ku mabidangay amiida tu saculil a kazizeng, sangaleb mabinang palawpes tu simal nu pabesbesay tu kazizeng sakay alipahak atu paseneng tu kalamkam a wayway. laylay saykay a nizaateng tu kanatal sakay kazizeng mades ku pikuwan, makai' tu siduba'ay a kazize atu madademecay a kazizeng. kanahatu caay kahapinang ku nipalatatenga' nu tademaw tu singku sibalucu'aytu, u tanenngay alalid sa ku saculil atu nayay a kazizeng. simapatayay i zazan anca pangangan han tu "mabetelu", malilid ku kazizeng tu kabiyalawan a akawaw, hakay tabaki ku nikalabades nu uzip malawpes ku zaysang. ayazaay a ziday sapiculu' kanca u kikayay a kazizeng, namahiza sikawaw tu saculilan kauzipan nu tademaw amin silekeluh aca. sakasa hamin nu kanatal, sikawaw tu saculilan a nikapatay tapang hatu nu tademaw ku sakahini. tada u saayaway a nipasiluc. sikawaw silabades tu saculil yadah ku lalekalan, pasu u paculilay "patinaku kalamkam ku nipaculil, katuud ku nitupin, pabesbe amitabesiw, caay palaed ki nipaculil, muka tu epah paculil", nu kazizengay aca "patinaku mapeci' ku kikay, mabetas ku bihel" la'cus ku zazan " patinaku sibuhang ku zazan, la'cus ku taazihan nu saculilan" atu la'cus ku demiad "patinaku siwacah, lapacpac nu suleda, sangsang u udad" katalawan nu paculilay, mikacaway a labang, zazanay a tademaw atu zuma paculilay tu kazizeng acaay kalihalay ku nikauzip a sikalawpes nu kalisiw. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zuma a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kaziz…ôŇč, r~…ĺunuk a kaziz…ôŇč "kamu nu iŇč, ¶ar, kamu nu am…ôr~…ĺikaaj automobir~…ĺ…ô, kamu nu am…ôr~…ĺika, auto" an ¶a kaziz…ôŇč, sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj amisauŇčaj taajaw, ¶aaj kapidudu ¶ tu zazan atu diŇčsiŇč, asii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč amu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ku akaziz…ôŇč. tujni a kamu, tusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ atu kikajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, u kaziz…ôŇč ńßan, tujni adidi Ē~ °aj, tu tur~…ĺuaj an ¶a s…ôpataj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ, u akiti Ē~ ° ku nipisauŇčaj nu kasaziz…ôŇč u kaziz…ôŇč ńßan, "nikauzip a nisakamuan tu kaziz…ôŇč ńßananaj". i tawja a zidajaj a kamu, u s…ôpataj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ nu kaziz…ôŇč nu kikajaj r~…ĺunuk a kaziz…ônŇč, u madajumaj a ¶ukajmasan mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu simar~…ĺ atu bar~…ĺi, samar~…ĺikat i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, aŇčaŇčan i zazan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, u sapitupin tu tad…ômaw an ¶a u sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu tuud. satu i sakuwa tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, uma a kanatar~…ĺ masazuama ku nikawaw. patinaku tu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min -kow, ¶ajaj ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu pat…ôr~…ĺajanaj tu nu diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, atu tusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ, sanr~…ĺinsja i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč u "utubaj" ńßan, u mapakuwanaj a kaziz…ôŇč. i zipun, mi ¶ukajmas tu r~…ĺabuaj nu akuti Ē~ ° a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu sanr~…ĺisja u nipatańßkar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺi kitabakian tu *** mr~…ĺ tu tusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, mapar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a makuwan tu sunuk a kazizaŇč "automobir~…ĺ…ô" nika makaj nir~…ĺuŇčad tu r~…ĺikisi atu anuajawaj a piazińß tu sunuk a kaziz…ôŇč tabaki aku nizataŇč, kamu nu iŇč, automobir~…ĺ…ô, majdińß a izaw ku nipaz…ôŇč ir~…ĺabu tu nu diŇčki aa ai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu makai tu r~…ĺikutaj a zazan tu tukasaj a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, pasu naniar~…ĺ…ôsantu nika matatuŇčus tu sapupu tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ majdińß a ¶um…ôr~…ĺak tu bar~…ĺuńßaj r~…ĺar~…ĺajanaj a akuti Ē~ °, ajza mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj a k…ô-bwanaj nu r~…ĺunuk pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, sa ¶a mi ¶ukajmas sini ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a tan-k…ô- ¶…ô. i k…ô-ban a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nuzuma tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° atu zumaaj a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ matatinpaaj a kikaj par~…ĺa kaziz…ôŇč…ôn, mańßini mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč atu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč tuŇčusaj sabańß…ôr~…ĺ atu kikaj a tad…ômaw saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb tatuŇčus. mu ¶ukajmas tu siman amin ku kaziz…ôŇč, ¶a-ju r~…ĺar~…ĺajan a sajr~…ĺiw mar~…ĺa u pasai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan, i pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu kaziz…ôŇč patańßkar~…ĺ tu ar~…ĺ-jaŇč-ńßwa-tan a r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a bar~…ĺi, amauninŇč ku bar~…ĺi, u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan sa u akuti Ē~ ° atu ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin ku kitakit. am…ôr~…ĺika nu midiputaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč a nipiasip tu nipar~…ĺawp…ôs nu kaziz…ôŇč tu simar~…ĺ *- ¶jair~…ĺun, asi *,*** k…ô ku ar~…ĺ-jaŇč-ńßwa-tan, ¶a-ju a kaziz…ôŇč pajr~…ĺap…ôs tu ¶a-ju *- ¶ja-r~…ĺun, asiar~…ĺ-jaŇč-ńßwa-tan tu **,** k…ô. mańßiza, pa ¶akat tu simar~…ĺ mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu patańßkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a bar~…ĺi, mar~…ĺasasakamuan. katuud ku kanatar~…ĺ mańßiza mi ¶ukajmas tu zazan a sata an ¶a simar~…ĺ a sata "kamu nu iŇč, …ôn…ôrgj ta* a ¶t" ¶aj- ¶in a r~…ĺ…ôkakawa mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku pi ¶akaj nu binawr~…ĺan tu kaziz…ôŇč. namańßini, sakaj amińßur~…ĺak tujni a kawaw, par~…ĺańßad tu diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč atu par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu kikajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, u sasakamuan pasaza a par~…ĺańßad, mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu jadańßaj a kaziz…ôŇč tu saŇča Ē~ °aj nu misiwbajaj a migiŇčkiw, zajńßan tan…ôŇč nu pauniŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč, r~…ĺimad ńßan tu padiŇčkiaj a kusi "an ¶a misaŇčaaj tu ¶in a kusi"sanad amisur~…ĺim…ôd, ¶aaj ku kas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu pir~…ĺusim…ôt tu nipauniŇč, ama ¶akat kapańß ku pir~…ĺisim…ôt tu uniŇčn, sa ¶a tan…ôŇč ma ¶akat ku kar~…ĺamkam akuti Ē~ ° "adidi Ē~ ° ku simar~…ĺ a tabaki ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, nika padiŇčki a kusi atan…ôŇč par~…ĺiju tu adidi Ē~ °aj a sapaakuti Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺabu a kikaj". namańßini, katuud ku mar~…ĺuŇčadaj a kanatar~…ĺ ńßatu u ¶…ôn-bu ku mi ¶uzuńßaj tu ¶ana ¶anan a kawr~…ĺańßan, mitanam mińßur~…ĺak tu kajadańß ku nipi ¶ukajmas tu kaziz…ôŇč amapauniŇč ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. mańßizaaj zajr~…ĺiw a sata a tan…ôŇč tar~…ĺakaw ku kawr~…ĺańß an ¶a ¶ajaj kajadańß uniŇč a kaziz…ôŇč "mańßiniaj diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, r~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaja kaziz…ô Ňč ńßakaj u nipakutajajan tu zajr~…ĺiw tu bar~…ĺuńßaj r~…ĺar~…ĺajanaj diŇčki a kaziz…ôn g". nipar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ajzaaj a kaziz…ôŇčan iza ku **% u tan…ôŇčaj panukas…ôn, mki ¶ukajmas panukasan nu mukinnaj tan…ôŇč mis…ôr~…ĺ…ô tu nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu diŇčki atu uniŇč. am…ôr~…ĺika a pikajgian migiti tu d…ômiad tu sakaj r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a nikak…ôtunan tu kar~…ĺamkam nu siamar~…ĺ patańßkar~…ĺ matat…ôn gir~…ĺ, tatan…ôŇč nu r~…ĺabaŇč a kaziz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan a nikat…ôtunan, u kar~…ĺamkam nu simar~…ĺ **.* iŇč-r~…ĺi nu am…ôr~…ĺikaaj a ¶ja-r~…ĺuna "*.* kuŇč-s…ôn paj ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu kuŇč-r~…ĺ, **.* iŇč-r~…ĺi pajiŇč- ¶…ô- ¶ja-r~…ĺun" ańß…ômawaj a tur~…ĺaku a tatan…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan misumad a misakapańß, kajadańß nu simar~…ĺ **.* iŇč-r~…ĺi pajiŇč- ¶…ô- ¶ja-r~…ĺun "**.* kuŇč-s…ôn paj *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, **.* iŇč-r~…ĺi pajiŇč- ¶…ô- ¶ja-r~…ĺun". zajńßan takar~…ĺaw ku nikauniŇč ¶aaj katuduńß simar~…ĺ nu kaziz…ôŇč atu ¶aj-juaj a r~…ĺabu nu pasimar~…ĺan, ¶unus nujaanaj a sapaakuti zajr~…ĺiwaj a simar~…ĺan ¶aaj kajadańß ku nipisup…ôd tu r~…ĺajanaj, ¶aaj akadajum miar~…ĺa atu misanan i ¶aaj kajadańß a kitizaan, katuud tu ku mabidaŇčaj amiida tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb mabinaŇč par~…ĺawp…ôs tu simar~…ĺ nu pab…ôsb…ôsaj tu kaziz…ôŇč sakaj ar~…ĺipańßak atu pas…ôn…ôŇč tu kar~…ĺamkam a wajwaj. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj sajkaj a nizaat…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ sakaj kaziz…ôŇč mad…ôs ku pikuwan, makai Ē~ ° tu siduba Ē~ °aj a kaziz…ô atu madad…ôm…ô ¶aj a kaziz…ôŇč. kanańßatu ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč ku nipar~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw tu siŇčku sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °ajtu, u tan…ônŇčaj ar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu najaj a kaziz…ôŇč. simapatajaj i zazan an ¶a paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "mab…ôt…ôr~…ĺu", mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku kaziz…ôŇč tu kabijar~…ĺawan a akawaw, ńßakaj tabaki ku nikar~…ĺabad…ôs nu uzip mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku zajsaŇč. ajazaaj a zidaj sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° kan ¶a u kikajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, namańßiza sikawaw tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan kauzipan nu tad…ômaw amin sir~…ĺ…ôk…ôr~…ĺuńß a ¶a. sakasa ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ, sikawaw tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a nikapataj tapaŇč ńßatu nu tad…ômaw ku sakańßini. tada u saajawaj a nipasir~…ĺu ¶. sikawaw sir~…ĺabad…ôs tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ jadańß ku r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan, pasu u pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj "patinaku kar~…ĺamkam ku nipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, katuud ku nitupin, pab…ôsb…ô amitab…ôsiw, ¶aaj par~…ĺa…ôd ki nipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, muka tu …ôpańß pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ", nu kaziz…ôŇčaj a ¶a "patinaku map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° ku kikaj, mab…ôtas ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ" r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku zazan " patinaku sibuńßaŇč ku zazan, r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku taazińßan nu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan" atu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku d…ômiad "patinaku siwa ¶ańß, r~…ĺapa ¶pa ¶ nu sur~…ĺ…ôda, saŇčsaŇč u udad" katar~…ĺawan nu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj, mika ¶awaj a r~…ĺabaŇč, zazanaj a tad…ômaw atu zuma pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a ¶aaj kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku nikauzip a sikar~…ĺawp…ôs nu kar~…ĺisiw. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zuma a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == kazizeng, lunuk a kazizeng "kamu nu Ing, car, kamu nu Ameylikaay automobile, kamu nu Ameylika, auto" anca kazizeng, siicelangay amisaungay taayaw, caay kapiduduc tu zazan atu dingsing, asiicelang amuculil ku akazizeng. tuyni a kamu, tusaay a bihel atu kikayay a kazizeng, u kazizeng han, tuyni adidi'ay, tu tuluay anca sepatay a bihel, u akiti' ku nipisaungay nu kasazizeng u kazizeng han, "nikauzip a nisakamuan tu kazizeng hananay". i tawya a zidayay a kamu, u sepatay ku bihel nu kazizeng nu kikayay lunuk a kazizenng, u madayumay a cukaymasan malalamel tu simal atu bali, samalikat icelang, angangan i zazan muculil, u sapitupin tu tademaw anca u sapiculu' tu tuud. satu i sakuwa tu saculilan, uma a kanatal masazuama ku nikawaw. patinaku tu Cong-hwa-min -kow, cayay ku micukaymasay tu patelayanay tu nu dingkiay a kazizeng, atu tusaay a bihel, sanlinsya icelangay a kazizeng u "utubay" han, u mapakuwanay a kazizeng. i Zipun, micukaymas tu labuay nu akuti' a icelang nu sanlisya u nipatahkal tu bali kitabakian tu 125 ml tu tusaay a bihel a kazizeng, mapalecad a makuwan tu sunuk a kazizang "automobile" nika makay nilungad tu likisi atu anuayaway a piazih tu sunuk a kazizeng tabaki aku nizatang, kamu nu Ing, automobile, maydih a izaw ku nipazeng ilabu tu nu dingki aa aicelang atu makai tu likutay a zazan tu tukasay a saculilan, pasu nanialesantu nika matatungus tu sapupu tu hekal maydih a cumelak tu baluhay lalayanay a akuti', ayza malaheciay a ke-bwanay nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng, saca micukaymas siniculil a Tan-ke-ce. i ke-ban a lalangawan nuzuma tatenga' atu zumaay a saculil matatinpaay a kikay pala kazizengen, mahini mubahelay a kazizeng atu muculilay a kazizeng tungusay sabahel atu kikay a tademaw sangaleb tatungus. mucukaymas tu siman amin ku kazizeng, ca-yu lalayan a sayliw mala u pasaicelang a lalekalan, i piculil nu kazizeng patahkal tu al-yang-hwa-tan a la'cusay a bali, amauninng ku bali, u lalekalan sa u akuti' atu cilemin ku kitakit. Ameylika nu midiputay tu hekal pulung a nipiasip tu nipalawpes nu kazizeng tu simal 1-cyailun, asi 8,887 ke ku al-yang-hwa-tan, ca-yu a kazizeng paylapes tu ca-yu 1-cya-lun, asial-yang-hwa-tan tu 10,18 ke. mahiza, pacakat tu simal miselep tu patahkal tu la'cusay a bali, malasasakamuan. katuud ku kanatal mahiza micukaymas tu zazan a sata anca simal a sata "kamu nu Ing, Energy Tax Act" cay-cin a lekakawa maselep ku picakay nu binawlan tu kazizeng. namahini, sakay amihulak tuyni a kawaw, palahad tu dingkiay a kazizeng atu palamel tu kikayay a kazizeng, u sasakamuan pasaza a palahad, mililid tu yadahay a kazizeng tu sanga'ay nu misiwbayay a migingkiw, zayhan taneng nu pauningay a kazizeng, limad han tu padingkiay a kusi "anca misangaay tu cin a kusi"sanad amisulimed, caay ku kaselep tu pilusimet tu nipauning, amacakat kapah ku pilisimet tu uningn, saca taneng macakat ku kalamkam akuti' "adidi' ku simal a tabaki ku icelang, nika padingki a kusi ataneng paliyu tu adidi'ay a sapaakuti' tu labu a kikay". namahini, katuud ku malungaday a kanatal hatu u cen-bu ku micuzuhay tu canacanan a kawlahan, mitanam mihulak tu kayadah ku nipicukaymas tu kazizeng amapauning ku hekal. mahizaay zayliw a sata a taneng talakaw ku kawlah anca cayay kayadah uning a kazizeng "mahiniay dingkiay a kazizeng, lamelaya kazize ng hakay u nipakutayayan tu zayliw tu baluhay lalayanay dingki a kazizen g". nipalalecad, ayzaay a kazizengan iza ku 75% u tanengay panukasen, mkicukaymas panukasan nu mukinnay taneng misele tu nipalawpes tu dingki atu uning. Ameylika a pikaygian migiti tu demiad tu sakay lyen-pang cen-bu a nikaketunan tu kalamkam nu siamal patahkal mataten gil, tataneng nu labang a kazizeng i 1985 a mihcaan a nikatetunan, u kalamkam nu simal 27.5 ing-li nu Ameylikaay a cya-luna "8.6 kung-sen paycacay a lasubu kung-l, 33.0 ing-li paying-ce-cya-lun" ahemaway a tulaku a tataneng I 2007 a mihcaan misumad a misakapah, kayadah nu simal 22.2 ing-li paying-ce-cya-lun "10.6 kung-sen pay 100 kung-li, 26.7 ing-li paying-ce-cya-lun". zayhan takalaw ku nikauning caay katuduh simal nu kazizeng atu cay-yuay a labu nu pasimalan, cunus nuyaanay a sapaakuti zayliway a simalan caay kayadah ku nipisuped tu layanay, caay akadayum miala atu misanan i caay kayadah a kitizaan, katuud tu ku mabidangay amiida tu saculil a kazizeng, sangaleb mabinang palawpes tu simal nu pabesbesay tu kazizeng sakay alipahak atu paseneng tu kalamkam a wayway. laylay saykay a nizaateng tu kanatal sakay kazizeng mades ku pikuwan, makai' tu siduba'ay a kazize atu madademecay a kazizeng. kanahatu caay kahapinang ku nipalatatenga' nu tademaw tu singku sibalucu'aytu, u tanenngay alalid sa ku saculil atu nayay a kazizeng. simapatayay i zazan anca pangangan han tu "mabetelu", malilid ku kazizeng tu kabiyalawan a akawaw, hakay tabaki ku nikalabades nu uzip malawpes ku zaysang. ayazaay a ziday sapiculu' kanca u kikayay a kazizeng, namahiza sikawaw tu saculilan kauzipan nu tademaw amin silekeluh aca. sakasa hamin nu kanatal, sikawaw tu saculilan a nikapatay tapang hatu nu tademaw ku sakahini. tada u saayaway a nipasiluc. sikawaw silabades tu saculil yadah ku lalekalan, pasu u paculilay "patinaku kalamkam ku nipaculil, katuud ku nitupin, pabesbe amitabesiw, caay palaed ki nipaculil, muka tu epah paculil", nu kazizengay aca "patinaku mapeci' ku kikay, mabetas ku bihel" la'cus ku zazan " patinaku sibuhang ku zazan, la'cus ku taazihan nu saculilan" atu la'cus ku demiad "patinaku siwacah, lapacpac nu suleda, sangsang u udad" katalawan nu paculilay, mikacaway a labang, zazanay a tademaw atu zuma paculilay tu kazizeng acaay kalihalay ku nikauzip a sikalawpes nu kalisiw. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zuma a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kaziz…ôŇč, r~…ĺunuk a kaziz…ôŇč "kamu nu iŇč, ¶ar, kamu nu am…ôr~…ĺikaaj automobir~…ĺ…ô, kamu nu am…ôr~…ĺika, auto" an ¶a kaziz…ôŇč, sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj amisauŇčaj taajaw, ¶aaj kapidudu ¶ tu zazan atu diŇčsiŇč, asii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč amu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ku akaziz…ôŇč. tujni a kamu, tusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ atu kikajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, u kaziz…ôŇč ńßan, tujni adidi Ē~ °aj, tu tur~…ĺuaj an ¶a s…ôpataj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ, u akiti Ē~ ° ku nipisauŇčaj nu kasaziz…ôŇč u kaziz…ôŇč ńßan, "nikauzip a nisakamuan tu kaziz…ôŇč ńßananaj". i tawja a zidajaj a kamu, u s…ôpataj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ nu kaziz…ôŇč nu kikajaj r~…ĺunuk a kaziz…ônŇč, u madajumaj a ¶ukajmasan mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu simar~…ĺ atu bar~…ĺi, samar~…ĺikat i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, aŇčaŇčan i zazan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, u sapitupin tu tad…ômaw an ¶a u sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu tuud. satu i sakuwa tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, uma a kanatar~…ĺ masazuama ku nikawaw. patinaku tu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min -kow, ¶ajaj ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu pat…ôr~…ĺajanaj tu nu diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, atu tusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ, sanr~…ĺinsja i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč u "utubaj" ńßan, u mapakuwanaj a kaziz…ôŇč. i zipun, mi ¶ukajmas tu r~…ĺabuaj nu akuti Ē~ ° a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu sanr~…ĺisja u nipatańßkar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺi kitabakian tu *** mr~…ĺ tu tusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, mapar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a makuwan tu sunuk a kazizaŇč "automobir~…ĺ…ô" nika makaj nir~…ĺuŇčad tu r~…ĺikisi atu anuajawaj a piazińß tu sunuk a kaziz…ôŇč tabaki aku nizataŇč, kamu nu iŇč, automobir~…ĺ…ô, majdińß a izaw ku nipaz…ôŇč ir~…ĺabu tu nu diŇčki aa ai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu makai tu r~…ĺikutaj a zazan tu tukasaj a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, pasu naniar~…ĺ…ôsantu nika matatuŇčus tu sapupu tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ majdińß a ¶um…ôr~…ĺak tu bar~…ĺuńßaj r~…ĺar~…ĺajanaj a akuti Ē~ °, ajza mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj a k…ô-bwanaj nu r~…ĺunuk pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, sa ¶a mi ¶ukajmas sini ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a tan-k…ô- ¶…ô. i k…ô-ban a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nuzuma tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° atu zumaaj a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ matatinpaaj a kikaj par~…ĺa kaziz…ôŇč…ôn, mańßini mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč atu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kaziz…ôŇč tuŇčusaj sabańß…ôr~…ĺ atu kikaj a tad…ômaw saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb tatuŇčus. mu ¶ukajmas tu siman amin ku kaziz…ôŇč, ¶a-ju r~…ĺar~…ĺajan a sajr~…ĺiw mar~…ĺa u pasai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan, i pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu kaziz…ôŇč patańßkar~…ĺ tu ar~…ĺ-jaŇč-ńßwa-tan a r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a bar~…ĺi, amauninŇč ku bar~…ĺi, u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan sa u akuti Ē~ ° atu ¶ir~…ĺ…ômin ku kitakit. am…ôr~…ĺika nu midiputaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč a nipiasip tu nipar~…ĺawp…ôs nu kaziz…ôŇč tu simar~…ĺ *- ¶jair~…ĺun, asi *,*** k…ô ku ar~…ĺ-jaŇč-ńßwa-tan, ¶a-ju a kaziz…ôŇč pajr~…ĺap…ôs tu ¶a-ju *- ¶ja-r~…ĺun, asiar~…ĺ-jaŇč-ńßwa-tan tu **,** k…ô. mańßiza, pa ¶akat tu simar~…ĺ mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu patańßkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a bar~…ĺi, mar~…ĺasasakamuan. katuud ku kanatar~…ĺ mańßiza mi ¶ukajmas tu zazan a sata an ¶a simar~…ĺ a sata "kamu nu iŇč, …ôn…ôrgj ta* a ¶t" ¶aj- ¶in a r~…ĺ…ôkakawa mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku pi ¶akaj nu binawr~…ĺan tu kaziz…ôŇč. namańßini, sakaj amińßur~…ĺak tujni a kawaw, par~…ĺańßad tu diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč atu par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu kikajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, u sasakamuan pasaza a par~…ĺańßad, mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu jadańßaj a kaziz…ôŇč tu saŇča Ē~ °aj nu misiwbajaj a migiŇčkiw, zajńßan tan…ôŇč nu pauniŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč, r~…ĺimad ńßan tu padiŇčkiaj a kusi "an ¶a misaŇčaaj tu ¶in a kusi"sanad amisur~…ĺim…ôd, ¶aaj ku kas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu pir~…ĺusim…ôt tu nipauniŇč, ama ¶akat kapańß ku pir~…ĺisim…ôt tu uniŇčn, sa ¶a tan…ôŇč ma ¶akat ku kar~…ĺamkam akuti Ē~ ° "adidi Ē~ ° ku simar~…ĺ a tabaki ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, nika padiŇčki a kusi atan…ôŇč par~…ĺiju tu adidi Ē~ °aj a sapaakuti Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺabu a kikaj". namańßini, katuud ku mar~…ĺuŇčadaj a kanatar~…ĺ ńßatu u ¶…ôn-bu ku mi ¶uzuńßaj tu ¶ana ¶anan a kawr~…ĺańßan, mitanam mińßur~…ĺak tu kajadańß ku nipi ¶ukajmas tu kaziz…ôŇč amapauniŇč ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. mańßizaaj zajr~…ĺiw a sata a tan…ôŇč tar~…ĺakaw ku kawr~…ĺańß an ¶a ¶ajaj kajadańß uniŇč a kaziz…ôŇč "mańßiniaj diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, r~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaja kaziz…ô Ňč ńßakaj u nipakutajajan tu zajr~…ĺiw tu bar~…ĺuńßaj r~…ĺar~…ĺajanaj diŇčki a kaziz…ôn g". nipar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ajzaaj a kaziz…ôŇčan iza ku **% u tan…ôŇčaj panukas…ôn, mki ¶ukajmas panukasan nu mukinnaj tan…ôŇč mis…ôr~…ĺ…ô tu nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu diŇčki atu uniŇč. am…ôr~…ĺika a pikajgian migiti tu d…ômiad tu sakaj r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a nikak…ôtunan tu kar~…ĺamkam nu siamar~…ĺ patańßkar~…ĺ matat…ôn gir~…ĺ, tatan…ôŇč nu r~…ĺabaŇč a kaziz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan a nikat…ôtunan, u kar~…ĺamkam nu simar~…ĺ **.* iŇč-r~…ĺi nu am…ôr~…ĺikaaj a ¶ja-r~…ĺuna "*.* kuŇč-s…ôn paj ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu kuŇč-r~…ĺ, **.* iŇč-r~…ĺi pajiŇč- ¶…ô- ¶ja-r~…ĺun" ańß…ômawaj a tur~…ĺaku a tatan…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan misumad a misakapańß, kajadańß nu simar~…ĺ **.* iŇč-r~…ĺi pajiŇč- ¶…ô- ¶ja-r~…ĺun "**.* kuŇč-s…ôn paj *** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, **.* iŇč-r~…ĺi pajiŇč- ¶…ô- ¶ja-r~…ĺun". zajńßan takar~…ĺaw ku nikauniŇč ¶aaj katuduńß simar~…ĺ nu kaziz…ôŇč atu ¶aj-juaj a r~…ĺabu nu pasimar~…ĺan, ¶unus nujaanaj a sapaakuti zajr~…ĺiwaj a simar~…ĺan ¶aaj kajadańß ku nipisup…ôd tu r~…ĺajanaj, ¶aaj akadajum miar~…ĺa atu misanan i ¶aaj kajadańß a kitizaan, katuud tu ku mabidaŇčaj amiida tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb mabinaŇč par~…ĺawp…ôs tu simar~…ĺ nu pab…ôsb…ôsaj tu kaziz…ôŇč sakaj ar~…ĺipańßak atu pas…ôn…ôŇč tu kar~…ĺamkam a wajwaj. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj sajkaj a nizaat…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺ sakaj kaziz…ôŇč mad…ôs ku pikuwan, makai Ē~ ° tu siduba Ē~ °aj a kaziz…ô atu madad…ôm…ô ¶aj a kaziz…ôŇč. kanańßatu ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč ku nipar~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw tu siŇčku sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °ajtu, u tan…ônŇčaj ar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu najaj a kaziz…ôŇč. simapatajaj i zazan an ¶a paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "mab…ôt…ôr~…ĺu", mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku kaziz…ôŇč tu kabijar~…ĺawan a akawaw, ńßakaj tabaki ku nikar~…ĺabad…ôs nu uzip mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku zajsaŇč. ajazaaj a zidaj sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° kan ¶a u kikajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, namańßiza sikawaw tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan kauzipan nu tad…ômaw amin sir~…ĺ…ôk…ôr~…ĺuńß a ¶a. sakasa ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ, sikawaw tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a nikapataj tapaŇč ńßatu nu tad…ômaw ku sakańßini. tada u saajawaj a nipasir~…ĺu ¶. sikawaw sir~…ĺabad…ôs tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ jadańß ku r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan, pasu u pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj "patinaku kar~…ĺamkam ku nipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, katuud ku nitupin, pab…ôsb…ô amitab…ôsiw, ¶aaj par~…ĺa…ôd ki nipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, muka tu …ôpańß pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ", nu kaziz…ôŇčaj a ¶a "patinaku map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° ku kikaj, mab…ôtas ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ" r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku zazan " patinaku sibuńßaŇč ku zazan, r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku taazińßan nu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan" atu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku d…ômiad "patinaku siwa ¶ańß, r~…ĺapa ¶pa ¶ nu sur~…ĺ…ôda, saŇčsaŇč u udad" katar~…ĺawan nu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj, mika ¶awaj a r~…ĺabaŇč, zazanaj a tad…ômaw atu zuma pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a ¶aaj kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku nikauzip a sikar~…ĺawp…ôs nu kar~…ĺisiw. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zuma a natin…ôŇčan
